from collections import defaultdict, Counter

class Solution:
    def isPossible(self, nums: List[int]) -> bool:
        freq = Counter(nums)
        ends = defaultdict(int)
        
        for num in nums:
            if freq[num] == 0:
                continue
            if ends[num - 1] > 0:
                ends[num - 1] -= 1
                ends[num] += 1
                freq[num] -= 1
            else:
                if freq[num + 1] > 0 and freq[num + 2] > 0:
                    freq[num] -= 1
                    freq[num + 1] -= 1
                    freq[num + 2] -= 1
                    ends[num + 2] += 1
                else:
                    return False
        return True

def isPossible(self, nums: List[int]) -> bool:
        freq = Counter(nums)
        ends = defaultdict(int)
        
        for num in nums:
            if freq[num] == 0:
                continue
            if ends[num - 1] > 0:
                ends[num - 1] -= 1
                ends[num] += 1
                freq[num] -= 1
            else:
                if freq[num + 1] > 0 and freq[num + 2] > 0:
                    freq[num] -= 1
                    freq[num + 1] -= 1
                    freq[num + 2] -= 1
                    ends[num + 2] += 1
                else:
                    return False
        return True

            else:

                    freq[num] -= 1
                    freq[num + 1] -= 1
                    freq[num + 2] -= 1
                    ends[num + 2] += 1
                else:
                    return False
        return True
